name: ChkCreate_SQCObservationAsrPDU, ChkStart_SQCObservationAsrPDU
title: ChkCreate_SQCObservationAsrPDU, ChkStart_SQCObservationAsrPDU
description: Monitors the SQC of a PDU or a single signal group of a PDU. The check condition is violated if the last SQC does not match to the current contained in the PDU or signal group. The check can be set up for a single PDU or a single signal group within a PDU.
The functions/constructors without the parameter signalGroup monitors all specified SQC's within the given PDU.
The numeric functions/constructors with the parameter aHeaderId cannot be used for FlexRay.

parameters.name: aHeaderId
parameters.description: PDU header ID to be observed. The corresponding PDU shall be defined in the database.

parameters.name: signalGroup
parameters.description: Signal group with SQC to be observed.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
